div.p: This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li: Import all the codes that are contained in https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J155-MethodGlucoseSanguin-ENS/FHIR/JDV-J155-MethodGlucoseSanguin-ENS
Import all the codes that are contained in https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J156-MethodGlucoseInterstitiel-ENS/FHIR/JDV-J156-MethodGlucoseInterstitiel-ENS

title.value: Méthode de mesures de glycémie sanguine ou interstitielle

description.value: Méthode de mesures de glycémie sanguine ou interstitielle.
